meta.purpose: Local-first paper pipeline orchestrator between Zotero and Obsidian: detect -> note -> PDF (OA-first) -> AI-analysis queue -> vault index, plus search/add, dashboard, alerts, citation graph, related papers, synthesis suggestions.
meta.note: Lightweight orientation map for humans and AI agents. The CODE is the source of truth; regenerate/adjust this file whenever module-level structure changes. Read AGENTS.md first for the change protocol.
meta.change_protocol: propose-first: read AGENTS.md + this file + docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, submit a written plan (files to touch, invariants affected, tests), get user approval, then edit. Apply to the installed app with scripts/apply_edits.sh (never re-sign).
meta.distribution: PyPI: pip install zotvault (extras: [tray]). Publishing = Trusted Publishing (OIDC): .github/workflows/publish.yml runs on GitHub Release publish — build -> wheel sanity check -> upload. No stored tokens. Release procedure: bump zotvault/__init__.py + pyproject.toml -> CHANGELOG -> commit -> tag vX.Y.Z -> publish GitHub Release.

runtime.language: Python >= 3.9, standard library ONLY (zero runtime deps; keep it that way)

entry_points.daemon: zotvault.cli daemon -> zotvault.daemon.run (poll loop + web thread + daily jobs)
entry_points.app_bundle: /Applications/ZotVault.app — FROZEN ad-hoc-signed launcher (TCC grants bind to the signature; bundle is never modified). Code loads from ~/.zotvault/app via PYTHONPATH.

install.full_build: scripts/build_app.sh (icon/launcher changes or fresh install; changes the signature -> user must re-grant Full Disk Access afterwards)
install.code_edits: scripts/apply_edits.sh (rsync repo -> ~/.zotvault/app + daemon restart; bundle untouched, FDA grant survives) — DEFAULT way to ship changes

runtime.modes: full (vault configured) | zotero-only ([vault] dir empty): search/add/alerts/proxy/trace active, note+annotation+queue+enrich machinery off via papers_dir-None guards; /api/status.mode, doctor '(optional)' convention, dashboard hides vault sections

config.loader: zotvault/config.py (tomllib on 3.11+, built-in mini parser on 3.9)
config.rule: NOTHING user-specific is hardcoded in the package; personal values live only in this file.

tables.items: one row per Zotero parent item: item_id, item_key, citekey, doi, arxiv_id, note_status, pdf_status/path, analysis_done, citation_count, s2_id, enriched_at, deleted, retries
tables.kv: watermarks & scheduling (last_run, doi_backfill_done, alerts_last_day, enrich_last_ts, proxy_dl_<day>)
tables.trace: append-only audit of every automatic action
tables.alerts: arXiv digest inbox: arxiv_id, title, matched, status pending|approved|dismissed|added
tables.embeddings: citekey -> float32 blob (Ollama nomic-embed-text), src_mtime for staleness
tables.citations: in-library edges citekey->citekey (from Semantic Scholar references)

data_stores.pdf_dir: ~/.zotvault/pdfs/<citekey>.pdf (ZotVault-downloaded PDFs; NEVER writes into Zotero storage/)

vault.analysis_note: <citekey>_*_analysis.md — written by the user's AI workflow, only DETECTED here
vault.index_log: index.md progress counters patched via strict regex only; log.md append-only

modules.purpose: defaults + TOML + env config loading
sqlite state + audit trace + budgets + migrations
READ-ONLY Zotero: sqlite snapshot copy, items/fields/creators/pdf paths, Better BibTeX JSON-RPC citekeys, Extra-field fallback

One-shot add: DOI/arXiv -> Crossref/DataCite/arXiv resolvers -> connector saveItems. v0.9.1: strip_markup() sanitizes MathML/JATS in titles (empty-sep joins math text nodes, drops mml:annotation, unescapes entities; space-sep for abstracts); DOI adds do one Unpaywall lookup and put the OA PDF in the payload's attachments so ZOTERO downloads it itself (storage/ invariant intact; proxy PDFs stay on the daemon path)
Papers_Zotero_v3-compatible note creation; atomic write; skip-if-exists
PDF chain: zotero attachment -> cache -> arXiv -> Unpaywall -> proxy(M3); budgets+delays
opt-in licensed fallback: EZproxy {url} template + browser cookies.txt session, citation_pdf_url heuristic, strict budget
which citekey folders lack *_analysis.md; completion detection source
vault index.md counter patch (strict regex) + log.md append

run_once orchestration: diff Zotero vs state, per-item note/pdf/state, deletions (vault untouched), analysis detection, vault records | v0.9.3: reconciliation — user-deleted notes marked note_status='missing' BEFORE item processing (never auto-recreated; _process_item guards on it); Zotero-deleted items were already mark_deleted
Poll loop: run_loop(cfg, stop_event, paused_event) core shared by CLI run() (signals+pid lock) and tray; daily jobs (alerts fetch -> assist triage, enrich); DB-signature skip

stdlib ThreadingHTTPServer JSON API + static dashboard; RUN_LOCK shared with daemon | v0.9.1: successful /api/add spawns a delayed (4s) background _run_pipeline_guarded cycle so note/queue/PDF appear in seconds
single-file dashboard UI (fetch-based; no framework)
arXiv/S2/Crossref search -> SearchResult, in-library annotation
arXiv keyword digest -> inbox; approve -> zotero_writer (propose-don't-execute)
Semantic Scholar citationCount + in-library citation edges; Citation_Graph.md regeneration
Ollama embeddings over analysis notes; cosine top-k; Related_Suggestions.md
greedy leader clustering of analyzed-but-unsynthesized papers; _Synthesis_Suggestions.md
all commands + doctor checks + launchd plist | v0.9.1: cmd_add POSTs /api/run-once to a running daemon after successful adds

pluggable AI analysis engine (v0.6): ollama/claude-cli/openai-compatible/anthropic; neutral-review prompt; pdftotext full text with abstract fallback; daily budget; never overwrites existing analyses; bg single-flight runner
Message catalog (en default, ko opt-in via [app] language); t()/set_language

Edit-safe Zotero annotation sync: render marker block (highlights grouped by color, user-renamable labels; figure/area images copied from Zotero cache and embedded), sha1 digest for idempotence, upsert only between zotvault:annotations markers
Small-local-model structured output (Ollama format=json, temp 0, schema validation + one feedback retry, silent give-up). Task 1: alert triage scoring 0-10
Optional system tray (pystray/Pillow extras; import-guarded). Menu: Open Dashboard / Run now / Pause / Quit around daemon.run_loop

http_api.base: http://127.0.0.1:8377 (localhost only, no auth — do not expose)
consumers: Polaris tools (polaris/tools/zotvault_tools.py in the Polaris repo)
http_api./api/attention: GET reconciliation lists {missing, vault_only, ignored}; POST /api/attention/action {item_key, action: recreate|ignore|dismiss|readd|unignore}

external_apis.semantic_scholar: api.semanticscholar.org/graph/v1 (search, citations/references; optional key; backs off on 429)

invariants: NEVER write to zotero.sqlite or Zotero storage/ (reads via temp snapshot; adds via Zotero's own connector endpoint)
NEVER rewrite an existing paper note (My Synthesis is user-owned); only the three AUTO notes are regenerated
NO delete code path against the vault; Zotero deletions only mark state
index.md touched only via PROGRESS_RE; log.md append-only; dry_run must skip all writes
network etiquette: sequential, delayed, per-day budgets (OA + separate stricter proxy budget), back off on 429
adding papers requires explicit user selection (propose-don't-execute); alerts inbox never auto-adds
zero runtime dependencies; Python 3.9 compatible syntax
no personal data in code — config only
every automatic action writes a trace row

extension_points.name: pdf source
extension_points.how: add a candidate producer in pdf_resolver.resolve chain (respect budgets/delays)

extension_points.name: analysis engine automation
extension_points.how: queue is the contract: spawn `claude -p` (or any LLM) on analysis_queue.pending items; completion is auto-detected by file appearance

extension_points.name: reference explorer (BACKLOG, user-floated)
extension_points.how: given DOI/arXiv id, enrich.s2_fetch with references.title,externalIds -> list with in-library marks -> user-selected adds. Separate dashboard view; do NOT pollute the time-based alerts inbox

extension_points.name: dashboard section
extension_points.how: add endpoint in webapp.py + section in static/index.html

extension_points.name: new agent bridge
extension_points.how: consume the localhost API like polaris/tools/zotvault_tools.py

extension_points.name: search source
extension_points.how: add search_<source>() in search.py returning SearchResult, wire into search()

extension_points.name: analysis engine
extension_points.how: add _gen_<engine>() in analyze.py + branch in generate() + ENGINES tuple + doctor check
